chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.object: does not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: Payment
triplets.object: new payment records with negative amounts

triplets.subject: Refund
triplets.object: a customer when an order is cancelled

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price At
entities_post_resolution.definition: Unit price at time of order is the historical price per unit recorded for a product on a sales order line at the moment the order was placed.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Examples**:
- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | **Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | **Business Rules**:
- Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase.

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is an individual product entry within a sales order that represents a single product purchase and captures the price at the moment of ordering, identified by a unique line item identifier.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Business Rules**:
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation | **Synonyms**: line item, order detail, order row | **Related Concepts**: SalesOrder, Product | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line-item in a sales order representing a specific product within an order, identified by a line-item ID and linked to the parent order via ORDER_ID and to the product via PRODUCT_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line item within a Sales Order that specifies a product, quantity, and unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Product Relationships:
- A Product appears on zero or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A foreign key in TB_CATEGORY that stores the parent category's ID for hierarchical self-reference.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Represents a monetary transaction applied to a Sales Order, identified by a payment_id and including attributes such as amount.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Payment amount | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | **Business Rules**:
- Payment must be confirmed before order ships | **Business Rules**:
- Refunds create new payment records with negative amounts | **Business Rules**:
- Multiple payment attempts can exist for one order | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr.Cust Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The CUST_ID column in the SALES_ORDER_HDR table that stores the customer identifier associated with a sales order (typically a foreign key to CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Shipment is a discrete shipment record associated with a Sales Order, identified by a unique shipment ID and containing shipment tracking information.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | **Key Attributes**:
- Tracking number | **Key Attributes**:
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment | **Business Rules**:
- One order may have multiple partial shipments | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A formal transaction document recording a customer's order for products from the platform, constituting the agreement to supply goods.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Sales Order | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | A Sales Order has one or more Payments | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Customer Relationships:
- A Cu

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master(Cust Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A master data entity representing customers, identified by the primary key CUST_ID, and used as the referent for customer foreign keys in sales transactions.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Line 1
entities_post_resolution.definition: Line 1 represents a line-item example for a product (Wireless Headphones) with a unit price in a sales catalog or order context (e.g., 2 units at €79.99 each).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | **Examples**:
- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: A policy document outlining the conditions and timeframes under which customers can return products and obtain refunds.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

| REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES |
| CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Account creation timestamp | NO |
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Order creation timestamp | NO |
